basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate, Senior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.department: Centre for Applied Research in Electronics (CARE)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has invited applications for project positions under the project "Development of On-Demand Single Photon Emitters, Single Photon Avalanche Detectors, High-Frequency Devices and Nanowire Quantum Devices Utilizing GaAs and InP-Based Epitaxial Semiconductors". Applications are invited from Indian nationals for Research Associate (02 posts) and Senior Research Fellow (01 post) on contractual basis. The last date to submit applications by email is 20 July 2026. Find complete details on eligibility, pay, qualifications, and application process below.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates

qualification.details: Research Associate (a) | PhD awarded in Physics/ECE/Material Science Essential: Semiconductor Device fabrication & Measurement Desirable: Silvaco Simulation & Fabrication of III-V / Compound Semiconductor Photodetector/SPAD | Research Associate (b) | PhD awarded in Physics/ECE/Material Science Essential: Semiconductor Device fabrication & Measurement Desirable: Quantum Photon Emission / Quantum Photodetector | Senior Research Fellow | 4-year Bachelor’s degree in Physical Sciences or Electronics / Master’s Degree in Physical Sciences or Electronics / Bachelor’s in Engineering or Technology 02 years experience in R&D Qualified National Level Exam (NET/GATE) | Note: 5% relaxation in marks for SC/ST candidates. Posts may be downgraded if suitable candidates are not found.

vacancy_details.details: Research Associate (a): 01 Post Research Associate (b): 01 Post Senior Research Fellow (SRF): 01 Post

how_to_apply: Download Form No. IRD/REC-4 from http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec
Fill the form with complete educational and experience details.
Send the duly filled form by email to Prof. Samaresh Das at [email protected]
Mention Advertisement No. IITD/IRD/169/2026 in the subject line.
Only shortlisted candidates will be informed for online interview.
important_instructions: Appointment is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular absorption. IIT Delhi reserves the right to fix higher shortlisting criteria. Shortlisted candidates’ names will be displayed on http://ird.iitd.ac.in/shortlisted For any clarification, contact Prof. Samaresh Das at [email protected] Incomplete applications or those received after the deadline will not be considered.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Delhi Research Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications by email is 20 July 2026 by 6:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in IIT Delhi Project Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 03 posts – 2 Research Associate and 1 Senior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Research Associate at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: Rs. 61,000/- per month plus HRA @27%.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for SRF position at IIT Delhi CARE 2026?
faq.answer: Master’s/Bachelor’s in relevant field + 2 years R&D experience + NET/GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q5. Is PhD mandatory for Research Associate posts in IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: Yes, PhD in Physics/ECE/Material Science is required for both Research Associate positions.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IIT Delhi MI03250G_SN project vacancy?
faq.answer: Download IRD/REC-4 form and send it by email to [email protected] with advertisement number in subject.

faq.question: Q7. What is the project duration for IIT Delhi Single Photon Emitters project?
faq.answer: Upto 31 March 2031.

faq.question: Q8. Is GATE qualification required for IIT Delhi SRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, qualified National Level Exam like NET/GATE is mandatory for SRF.

faq.question: Q9. Will there be any interview for IIT Delhi Research Associate selection?
faq.answer: Yes, only shortlisted candidates will be called for online interview.

faq.question: Q10. What is the age limit for IIT Delhi Project Positions 2026?
faq.answer: No specific upper age limit mentioned. Selection is based on qualifications and experience.
